'''S-4''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] in service to the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency as a [[quarantine inspector]]. He cleaned the baggage claim area with his associate, [[P-6]]. He was equipped with radar, a flyswatter, and a loupe. Both were supervised by a blue [[Quarantine supervisor R2 unit|R2 unit]]. He required locomotive pads to move.<ref name="CGST" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Quarantine inspector droid working with P-6. Uses magnifying glass and fly swatter to eliminate bugs.|S-4's description in ''Complete Guide to Star Tours''|<ref name="CGST" />}}
The background for this droid comes from a "Spot the Droid" poster displayed at the [[Tokyo Disneyland]] [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], which was translated at the [http://www.endorexpress.net EndorExpress.net] fan site<ref name="EE">{{EndorExpress|url=2013/05/retro-tokyo-a-look-back-at-tdls-star-tours-before-it-was-updated|text=Retro-Tokyo! A look back at TDL's Star Tours before it was updated…}}</ref>, as well as the ''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]'' booklet.<ref name="CGST" /> The droid was present during the opening day of the first ride, but he and his counterpart, [[P-6]], were eventually removed. The "droids" were portrayed by repurposed industrial robots.<ref name="EE" />
